public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as night-lantern inspector.
appearance: Practical layers, inspection tools, and a habit of carrying evidence or notes keep inquiry visibly close at hand.
manner: Asks more than they answer, preserving doubt until the evidence can bear weight. In Panim, that reads as someone grave, measured, and ritual-aware, with constant awareness of consequence, grief, and divine mediation, and the habits of a night-lantern inspector still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of night-lantern inspector in and around Panim Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Panim Haven workable through the obligations of night-lantern inspector while managing the immediate pressure of divine balance obligations in Panim.
hidden_pressure: Must move carefully enough to stay accurate and quickly enough not to lose the trail entirely. Around Panim Haven, that usually means carrying divine balance obligations, sacrificial and mediation decorum, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of night-lantern inspector visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Pelor Coffinmarch needs discreet assistance following contradictory evidence, frightened witnesses, or a lead too politically awkward to pursue openly in Panim Haven.
Working with Pelor Coffinmarch can place the party inside an active inquiry where every answer creates new exposure.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Questioning silence, inspection habits, and careful note-taking make Pelor Coffinmarch look like inquiry before accusation. In Panim Haven, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Panim.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Panim Haven: inquiry rooms, witness routes, guarded evidence sites, or contested scenes
who_seeks_them_out: those needing a problem solved quietly
